name: Model/tool/result/model loop native
summary: The web completion boundary now returns shared validator feedback into the model loop when a model-authored final answer fails contract validation. Deterministic logic remains enforcement and observation infrastructure: it validates, emits receipts, records checks, and keeps the run active for another model step instead of authoring a product answer.
remainingProof: live Agent Studio run where a weak final web reply is rejected, repaired by the model loop, and accepted without product-chat leaks
GUI screenshot evidence of clean final answer, source-rich work lane, and no raw validator/tool payload in the transcript
